zh.Bâgé-le-Châtel, Ain, Rhône-Alpes, France: 法國o-阿爾培斯艾巴勒勒-a特爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Bâgé於1200年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯艾巴勒勒-a特爾時，她的父親Guy de Bâgé23歲，母親Alix Adèle de Thiers-Châlon52歲。她於1218年7月18日與Humbert V de Beaujeu在法國o-阿爾培斯o波奧結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1252年3月1日在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯艾米尼享年52歲，埋葬在法國o-阿爾培斯艾米尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Bâgé于1200年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯艾巴勒勒-a特爾时，她的父亲Guy de Bâgé23岁，母亲Alix Adèle de Thiers-Châlon52岁。她于1218年7月18日与Humbert V de Beaujeu在法国o-阿爾培斯o波奧结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1252年3月1日在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯艾米尼享年52岁，埋葬在法国o-阿爾培斯艾米尼。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bâgé
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham and Yorkshire): possibly from Middle English bagge, Anglo-Norman French bage ‘badge, cognizance, emblem’, perhaps denoting someone who wore one as a sign of affiliation to a family or guild.
English: habitational name from The Bage in Dorstone, The Bage Farm in Madley, or Bage in Kington, all in Herefordshire. These are all names derived from Old English bæce ‘stream’; compare Bach 3.
French: variant of Bague, from the ancient Germanic personal name Bago, a short form of compound names based on the element bag ‘to fight’.

variants.name: Bach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Hans, Kurt, Fritz, Klaus, Horst, Johann, Alfons, Bernhard, Erna, Ernst.

German: topographic name for someone who lived by a stream, Middle High German bach ‘stream’. This surname is also found in some other European countries, most notably in Denmark and France (Alsace and Lorraine), but also in e.g. the Netherlands, Czechia (see also 5 below), and Croatia.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name from German Bach ‘stream, creek’.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Bâgé was born in 1200, in Bâgé-le-Châtel, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Guy de Bâgé, was 23 and her mother, Alix Adèle de Thiers-Châlon, was 52. She married Humbert V de Beaujeu on 18 July 1218, in Beaujeu, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died on 1 March 1252, in Mionnay, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 52, and was buried in Mionnay, Ain, Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Bâgé est née en 1200, à Bâgé-le-Châtel, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Guy de Bâgé, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Alix Adèle de Thiers-Châlon, avait 52 ans. Elle a épousé Humbert V de Beaujeu le 18 juillet 1218, à Beaujeu, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 mars 1252, à Mionnay, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Mionnay, Ain, Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Bâgé 1200 in Bâgé-le-Châtel, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy de Bâgé 23 und ihre Mutter Alix Adèle de Thiers-Châlon 52. Sie hat am 18. Juli 1218 in Beaujeu, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich Humbert V de Beaujeu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. März 1252 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Mionnay, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich und wurde in Mionnay, Ain, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Bâgé è nata il nel 1200 nel Bâgé-le-Châtel, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Guy de Bâgé, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Alix Adèle de Thiers-Châlon, aveva 52 anni. Lei sposato Humbert V de Beaujeu il 18 luglio 1218, nel Beaujeu, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 1 marzo 1252, nel Mionnay, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Mionnay, Ain, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Bâgéが1200年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスエインブaグe-レ-チaテルで生まれた時，父Guy de Bâgéは23歳，母Alix Adèle de Thiers-Châlonは52歳であった。1218年7月18日にフランスルhoネ-アルペスルhoンビーウジェウでHumbert V de Beaujeuと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1252年3月1日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスエインミオナイで52歳で死去し，フランスルhoネ-アルペスエインミオナイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Bâgé(이)가 1200년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 언 브a그e-레-cha텔에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy de Bâgé(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alix Adèle de Thiers-Châlon(은)는 52세였다. 그녀는 1218년 7월 18일 프랑스 ho니-알프스 ho니 보j우에서 Humbert V de Beaujeu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1252년 3월 1일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 언 미오나이에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 ho니-알프스 언 미오나이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Bâgé nasceu em 1200, em Bâgé-le-Châtel, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Guy de Bâgé, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Alix Adèle de Thiers-Châlon, tinha 52 anos. Ela casou-se com Humbert V de Beaujeu em 18 de julho de 1218, em Beaujeu, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de março de 1252, em Mionnay, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Mionnay, Ain, Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Bâgé родилась в 1200 г. в местности бaгe-ле-чaтел, эин, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Guy de Bâgé было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Alix Adèle de Thiers-Châlon, 52. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Humbert V de Beaujeu 18 июля 1218 г. в местности боджеу, рoн, рoне-алпесь, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла 1 марта 1252 г. в местности мионнеи, эин, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности мионнеи, эин, рoне-алпесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Bâgé nació en 1200, en Bâgé-le-Châtel, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Guy de Bâgé, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Alix Adèle de Thiers-Châlon, tenía 52 años. Se casó con Humbert V de Beaujeu el 18 de julio de 1218, en Beaujeu, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 1 de marzo de 1252, en Mionnay, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Mionnay, Ain, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
